column34: Bid Notes
The PM cost is based on 45 days X 8 hours a day this is for 1/2 the duration of the project.
The Administrative Assistant will coordinate sub contracts, insurances, day to day requirements of creating the necessary files for the project as well as administrating monthly payrolls.
The Project Controls are based on adminstating the submittal registry for the project this is 10.75 a day  out of the 88 construction time.
The Safety Manager will write the Safety plan for the project and be involved in all pre-construction plans required, this is based off of 6.5 days with the duration of the project being 88 days.
The Certified Payroll Administrator cost is based on 8 hrs a week for 12 weeks of construction time and 2 weeks of close out. as required.
The Superintendant cost is based on 8 hours a day for 90 working days + 71 hours to close project out.
